_README: Waiver + orphan tracking for architecture.json completeness. Consumed by tests/test_architecture_completeness.py, which asserts a module<->entry bijection: every top-level pdd/*.py module (after .pddignore) has exactly one architecture.json entry UNLESS it is listed in 'modules_without_architecture_entry'. The 'orphans' sections are visibility/ratchet tracking (prompt-no-code, code-no-prompt, code-no-test) so these gaps are explicit, not silent. Keep this file exact: adding/removing a module, prompt, or test without updating the relevant list fails the test with an actionable diff. To clear a waiver, add the missing architecture entry (pdd sync-architecture / author it) and delete the line here.

known_registry_exceptions._README: Pre-existing architecture.json data-quality issues that predate this gate. Documented (not fixed) so the gate is green on main while still failing on NEW occurrences. Ratchet these down over time.

duplicate_filepaths.pdd/user_story_tests.py: Pre-existing double-registration (two entries, priority 6 and 241, same filename/filepath). Tolerated by sync (_architecture_sync_modules merges duplicates by output path). TODO: dedupe to a single entry.
duplicate_filepaths.pdd/coverage_contracts.py: Pre-existing double-registration (two entries, priority 6 and 241, same filename/filepath). Tolerated by sync (merged by output path). TODO: dedupe to a single entry.

entries_without_description.test_context_packer_python.prompt: Pre-existing entry predating the 'description' field convention. TODO: add a description.
entries_without_description.compressed_sync_context_python.prompt: Pre-existing entry predating the 'description' field convention. TODO: add a description.

modules_without_architecture_entry.__main__: Package entry point for `python -m pdd`; thin CLI shim, not a prompt-generated unit.
modules_without_architecture_entry._selector_parse: Private leaf helper (underscore) for parsing include `select` attributes; no standalone prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.architecture_sync_helper: Hand-written filename-normalization helper for architecture_sync; no standalone prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.checkup_target: Deterministic `pdd checkup` target classifier; hand-written, no generating prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.compression_reporting: Deterministic context-compression reporting helper (#877); hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.context_snapshot_policy: Deterministic policy checks for snapshotted prompt context; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.continuous_sync: Deterministic continuous-sync classification/reconciliation reporting; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.drift_main: CLI entry wiring for `pdd checkup drift`; hand-written `_main`, no generating prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.grounding_provenance: Shared grounding-metadata helpers for llm_invoke/evidence manifests; hand-written leaf, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.interface_semantics: Deterministic interface-conformance helpers; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.json_atomic: Dependency-light atomic JSON write utility (guards architecture.json); hand-written leaf, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.json_invocation: Dependency-light leaf detecting JSON-only CLI invocations; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.language_extensions: Canonical file-extension source-of-truth table; hand-written leaf, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.list_drift_detection: Deterministic hardcoded-list-vs-canonical drift detector (pdd_cloud#1405); hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.prompt_gate: Prompt-quality gate config/workflow hooks; hand-written, no generating prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.source_set_model: Deterministic resolver of prompt-shaped checkup targets to `.prompt` paths; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.story_test_generation: Deterministic pytest generator from user-story files; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.sync_graph_order_consistency: Deterministic architecture.json-vs-<include> sync-order consistency detector; hand-written, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.test_result: Shared return-type dataclass for test-generation commands (#1072); hand-written leaf, no prompt.
modules_without_architecture_entry.waiver_policy: Shared waiver-status classification helpers; hand-written leaf, no prompt.

orphans._README: Informational tracking of adjacent gaps. These do NOT need architecture.json entries; they are listed so the gaps are visible and can be ratcheted down.

prompt_without_code.Makefile: Makefile_makefile.prompt generates the repo Makefile; output is not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.core_dump_smoke: core_dump_smoke_python.prompt is a smoke-test fixture (trivial add()); not a real module.
prompt_without_code.gate: gate_python.prompt/gate_policy_python.prompt; code lives at pdd/commands/gate.py (CLI command), not top-level pdd/gate.py.
prompt_without_code.language_format: language_format_csv.prompt generates a language data table (CSV); not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.llm_model: llm_model_csv.prompt generates the LLM model reference (CSV); not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.main_gen_prompt: Meta-prompt that generates prompt text; emits a prompt, not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.pdd_completion: pdd_completion_{bash,fish,zsh}.prompt generate shell-completion scripts; not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.pdd_theme: pdd_theme_json.prompt generates theme reference data (JSON); theme code is pdd/cli_theme.py.
prompt_without_code.prompt_tester: prompt_tester_python.prompt has no committed pdd/prompt_tester.py (standalone tool). TODO justify/reconcile.
prompt_without_code.pypi_description: pypi_description_restructuredtext.prompt generates the PyPI long description (rST); not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.pyproject: pyproject_toml.prompt generates pyproject.toml; not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.regression: regression_bash.prompt generates the regression harness script; not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.regression_analysis: regression_analysis_log.prompt emits regression analysis text; not a pdd/*.py module.
prompt_without_code.resurface_check: resurface_check_Python.prompt is a pdd_cloud Rising Stars Cloud Function; code lives in the pdd_cloud repo, not here.
prompt_without_code.run_generated: run_generated_python.prompt has no committed pdd/run_generated.py. TODO justify/reconcile.
prompt_without_code.task_routing: task_routing_csv.prompt generates routing config (CSV); not a pdd/*.py module.

code_without_prompt.drift_main: `pdd checkup drift` CLI wiring; see modules_without_architecture_entry.
code_without_prompt.gate_main: `pdd checkup gate` CLI wiring; hand-written `_main`, already registered in architecture.json without a generating prompt.
code_without_prompt.test_result: shared test-command return type; see modules_without_architecture_entry.

code_without_test.config_resolution: Centralized config resolution; TODO add tests/test_config_resolution.py.
code_without_test.contract_ir: Contract authoring IR; TODO add tests/test_contract_ir.py.

commands_without_prompt._README: Informational: pdd/commands/*.py CLI wrappers that are hand-written (no generating prompt), consistent with each other. Not enforced by the module<->entry bijection (that gate is scoped to top-level pdd/*.py). Listed so the gap is explicit, not silent (#1969 review nit).
commands_without_prompt.resolve: `pdd resolve` CONFLICT-finalization command; hand-written wrapper over sync_determine_operation/operation_log primitives, no generating prompt.
commands_without_prompt.reconcile: `pdd reconcile` deterministic fingerprint stamper; hand-written wrapper over continuous_sync, no generating prompt.
commands_without_prompt.drift: `pdd checkup drift` command wrapper; hand-written, no prompt.
commands_without_prompt.coverage: `pdd coverage` command wrapper; hand-written, no prompt.
commands_without_prompt.extracts: `pdd extracts` command wrapper; hand-written, no prompt.
commands_without_prompt.checkup_snapshot: `pdd checkup snapshot` command wrapper; hand-written, no prompt.
